use_codes.desc: TOPICAL TREATMENT OF MOLLUSCUM CONTAGIOSUM IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
TOPICAL TREATMENT OF SKIN LESIONS CAUSED BY AN INFECTION WITH MOLLUSCUM CONTAGIOSUM IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
TOPICAL DELIVERY OF A CANTHARIDIN FORMULATION TO ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 2 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER FOR TREATING MOLLUSCUM CONTAGIOSUM

indications.text: YCANTH is indicated for the topical treatment of molluscum contagiosum in adult and pediatric patients 2 years of age and older.
